title: isolepis fascicularis
intro: Isolepis fascicularis, also known as the Rough Club-rush, is a type of sedge that belongs to the family Cyperaceae. The plant is traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Isolepis fascicularis include its ability to treat fever, respiratory issues, and skin conditions, as well as its use as a diuretic to help with urinary problems. In herbal preparations, Isolepis fascicularis is often used in infusions, decoctions, or tinctures to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
